request: Independent reviewer B. You must inspect the project intent from this prompt: DinoBrain new-PC install must recreate the same OS behavior from GitHub/app/data, configure Codex and Claude MCP/hooks, create Observatory and verifier launchers, avoid unsafe overwrite, support reinstall/uninstall/purge, and prove release ZIP/SHA/tag/manifest parity. The plan says P2-12 requires installer/ref parity, release manifest with app/data commits and asset SHA, degraded Git-missing mode, installer:verify commands, uninstall:verify, installer:win, release:win --SkipUpload, install-equivalence and release-manifest verifiers included in verify:goal. Does this adequately cover install/release/new-PC equivalence completion conditions? Return a non-empty answer exactly: reviewer_id=R9; verdict=AGREE or REVISE_REQUIRED; blocking_objections=[...]; required_doc_changes=[...]; evidence_files=[docs/OS_REMAINING_GAPS_CONSENSUS_PLAN.md,docs/OS_COMPLETION_CONDITIONS.md,docs/INSTALL.md,docs/VERIFICATION.md].

gates.reason: The request or hook input was marked sensitive.
gates.safe_action: Do not store secrets or raw full transcripts; keep sync blocked until review.

gates.reason: The request may delete or reset durable data.
gates.safe_action: Require explicit confirmation and a backup/sync risk check before destructive execution.

gates.reason: The request touches sync, release, deployment, or backup behavior.
gates.safe_action: Run git_sync dry-run or installer/version alignment checks before publishing.

gates.reason: Every started OS task must be closed with finish_task.
gates.safe_action: Keep the task visible as active/pending until finish_task writes a trace.
